prompt: I need to create a new gh-aw workflow that reviews PRs when someone comments /review on them. The workflow should post a comment with the review results and add a reaction to the triggering comment. How should I set this up?

assertions.text: Recommends slash_command: trigger instead of manual issue_comment + startsWith parsing
Recommends the built-in reaction: field in frontmatter instead of manual emoji reaction step
Includes add-comment safe output configuration with max: and/or hide-older-comments
Mentions gh aw compile as a required step after creating the .md file
Provides a concrete YAML frontmatter example showing the workflow configuration
Does NOT recommend using issue_comment trigger with manual body parsing as the primary approach
